title: Remove dependency on kubernetes
body:
podman parse and attach were using a very small portion of the kubernetes code
but using it caused a signficant increase in binary size.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM. I generally don't like copying things from other projects, but vendoring 75000 lines of code for two structs and a single file is a bit much.

LGTM
@baude did this shrink the size of podman?

:pushpin: Commit 08d06a2 has been approved by `rhatdan`
